cards.built_on: day08 content modes: corrupt / drop / truncate / duplicate
cards.detectability: severity-dependent for `corrupt` (small offsets stay in-range and are MISSED); structural modes always caught
cards.name: Structured-output corruption

severity_schedule.corrupt: value += severity*111 (leaves range for small severity)

cards.trigger: any deterministic day08 trigger (call_index / every_n / input_match / seeded-probabilistic)
cards.what: The boundary returns a schema-violating payload — a wrong value, an out-of-range number, or a short/empty/duplicated token list.

cards.detectability: budget-gated: caught only when duration > budget (default 45 -> severity >= 4)
cards.name: Virtual timeout / latency
cards.what: The boundary returns the correct payload but takes too long; duration = BASE_LATENCY + severity*10.
